items.title: Restore browser-visible workbook freshness proof
items.question: Can the in-app Browser capture expected Google account, workbook context, and a current export/metadata proof without connector fallback?

items.title: Use work-rhythm only for assignment planning
items.question: Do the 73-person aggregate rhythm labels help Kevin prepare check-ins without becoming payroll evidence?

items.title: Track Codex log privacy fixes before upgrades
items.question: Is the local Codex CLI on a version with the WebSocket trace payload fix, and are automation debug logs scrubbed?

items.title: Draft a small agent release-control checklist
items.question: Can Kevin's workflows separate low-risk drafting, browser observation, and account-backed operation before delegating to newer agent models?

items.title: Watch MOHW social-work administrative capacity hiring
items.question: Did the July 6 social-assistance/social-work office hiring window close normally or produce a follow-up result?

items.title: Turn FSC education resources into a user map
items.question: Which FSC-linked resource should FamilyFin point users to for learning, calculators, term lookup, insurance education, and disputes?
